text: Triples CAN represent n-ary complexity via reification/event nodes — overclaim that they 'cannot'
Curation workflow (non-ML domain experts maintaining ontologies) is undervalued as platform differentiation
Competitor set mismatched: Cube/dbt are analytics semantic layers, not ontology platforms
Magnus's security/productionization skills (OAuth, circuit breaker, dual auth) undervalued in fit analysis
Munin capability transfer is non-trivial: MCP patterns, retrieval orchestration, provenance modeling, auth are portable
Missing contract-structure risk analysis (IP, exclusivity, white-label, liability)
No falsifiable diligence plan — what evidence to request to validate differentiation
No explicit opportunity-cost analysis against Munin roadmap focus
Enterprise ontology programs are organizational change, not just software — delivery fit != technical fit
Recommendation needs hard gates (engagement model, IP terms, non-exclusivity, tech access, unit economics)
Contract risk dismissal as 'standard consulting' misses point — still high-impact in channel model
Need explicit pass/fail thresholds, not narrative 'due diligence'
Must specify who needs to be in the meeting (engineering leadership) for valid technical signal
